news.headline: Invest Detroit and Ally Charitable Foundation donate $1M for Detroit's Strategic Neighborhood Fund to improve 10 neighborhoods.
news.summary: The Ally Charitable Foundation has provided a grant to support the affordable housing and Spark Grant programs of the SNF in Detroit. Established in 2016 by the City of Detroit and Invest Detroit, SNF aims to enhance the quality of life and economic opportunities in 10 neighborhoods across the city. This grant will help further their mission in the citywide initiatives. The grant was announced on February 18, 2025.

news.headline: Esperto Medical completes oversubscribed Series A financing to support Resonance Sonomanometry™ technology for blood pressure monitoring.
news.summary: A healthtech startup called Esperto Medical™, Inc., based in Irvine, California, recently announced on February 18, 2025, that it has received significant funds. These funds will be used to advance the productization and clinical testing of their innovative Resonance Sonomanometry™ technology. This technology aims to provide calibration-free, noninvasive, and continuous monitoring of blood pressure. Esperto Medical™ focuses on critical care solutions, and this funding will be instrumental in furthering their development efforts.

news.headline: Former FERC lawyer Jeremy Medovoy joins McGuireWoods to advise on high-stakes energy matters.
news.summary: Washington, D.C. – On February 18, 2025, McGuireWoods, a prominent law firm, announced its expansion in high-stakes energy matters through the recruitment of Jeremy Medovoy as a partner. Medovoy, a former Deputy Director of the Federal Energy Regulatory Commission, brings expertise in energy enforcement to the firm. The addition of Medovoy underscores the firm's commitment to advising clients on significant energy-related issues.

news.headline: Delta flights resume in Toronto after plane flip incident, the aircraft returning to service with minor damage.
Lumio launched in Chicago on Feb 18, 2025 to transform professional services with AI, founded by legal industry veterans.
news.summary: A new company called Lumio is being launched on Feb. 18, 2025, with the goal of changing the way professional services firms and top practitioners handle commercial and strategic obstacles to succeed in their markets. Lumio was founded by experienced individuals from the legal industry.

news.headline: Generational Group sells Lowry Mechanical to Sylvester & Cockrum, acquisition closed on Dec 11, 2024. Lowry is a HVAC contractor founded in 1978.
news.summary: Generational Group recently facilitated the sale of Lowry Mechanical to Sylvester & Cockrum (S&C) on December 11, 2024. Lowry Mechanical, established in 1978, is a prominent mechanical contractor offering HVAC, plumbing, specialty fabrication, and service solutions. The acquisition marks a significant milestone for both companies as Lowry Mechanical's expertise and reputation in South Carolina will now be integrated into S&C's operations. This strategic move is set to enhance S&C's service offerings and market presence in the region.

news.headline: Fonon Technologies to showcase laser tech at NOBLE TR/EX 2025 event in Orlando, featuring top defense manufacturers. Feb 18-19, 2025.
news.summary: Fonon Technologies, a company specializing in laser technologies for material processing and defense infrastructures, has confirmed its attendance at the NOBLE TR/EX 2025 Training/Expo in Orlando. The event, scheduled for February 18-19, 2025, will showcase cutting-edge technologies from leading manufacturers in the defense, emergency preparedness/response, and enterprise security sectors. It will provide mission-specific training for active-duty military personnel.

news.headline: Zion Oil & Gas resumes operations for MJ-01 well in Israel, ending current program on Feb 28.
news.summary: The ongoing unit program is set to conclude on February 28. Zion Oil & Gas, Inc. disclosed that operations have restarted on the recompletion of the Megiddo-Jezreel 1 (MJ-01) well in Israel. The company, listed as OTC: ZNOG, considers this development a notable operational achievement.

news.headline: CureMD launches AI Scribe, a fully automated system for clinical documentation & ordering, redefining healthcare.
news.summary: On February 18, 2025, CureMD introduced its AI Scribe, a revolutionary automated system for healthcare providers. This tool enhances clinical documentation and ordering processes, transforming the healthcare landscape. The AI Scribe is designed to streamline documentation procedures comprehensively, marking a significant advancement in the industry.

news.headline: Possibility of Bitcoin crashing as it tests $95,000 support multiple times, raising chances of drop below range lows.
news.summary: Repeatedly testing the $95,000 support for Bitcoin enhances the likelihood of a potential liquidity grab below the lows of the price range. This scenario raises concerns among market participants about increased volatility and potential price drops in the near term.

news.headline: US, Russia start Ukraine peace talks in Saudi, driving market caution. Intel shares surge.2 indices stable, oil holds.
news.summary: Key U.S. stock indices showed minimal movement during midday trading on Tuesday as investors kept a close eye on geopolitical events and awaited the upcoming release of the latest FOMC minutes. U.S. and Russian officials convened in Saudi Arabia for peace negotiations regarding the conflict in Ukraine, marking the first high-level discussions since Russia's invasion in 2022. The talks were initiated to establish trust and potentially pave the way for a meeting between President Trump and President Putin, although Ukrainian and other European representatives were notably missing. WTI crude oil futures remained stable amidst hopes of reduced geopolitical tensions due to the diplomatic dialogue between the U.S. and Russia. Meanwhile, the yield on the 10-year US Treasury note saw a 0.04% increase, surpassing the 4.5% mark as investors awaited more updates. To read the full story, visit Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Nvidia stock surges, boosted by overlooked factor.
BTC plunges below $95K as Solana, XRP, Dogecoin decline amidst LIBRA scandal; other top coins also drop.
news.summary: The price of Bitcoin has reached its lowest point in weeks, while Solana is experiencing a continued decline due to the LIBRA controversy. Additionally, other leading cryptocurrencies are also seeing a decrease in value.

news.headline: FTX starting initial distributions to customers, expecting funds in 1-3 business days. Next distribution set for May 30, 2025.
news.summary: FTX Trading Ltd. (known as FTX.com) has announced that customers included in the initial distributions are anticipated to receive their funds within 1-3 business days. The next distribution record date is scheduled for April 11, 2025, with the distribution set to take place on May 30, 2025. This information was disclosed in Wilmington, Delaware, on February 18, 2025.

news.headline: Lofta and PMTA collaborate to provide sleep apnea solutions for drivers, boosting safety.
news.summary: Lofta, a company specializing in sleep apnea diagnosis and management programs, has formed a strategic alliance with the Pennsylvania Motor Truck Association (PMTA) on February 18, 2025. This collaboration is part of Lofta's employer-focused platform, Lofta Direct, which focuses on providing services related to sleep apnea. The partnership seeks to...

news.headline: Brunel nominates Toine van Doremalen as CFO, pending shareholder approval - Peter de Laat appointed CEO from Oct 2024. 207 characters
news.summary: Today in Amsterdam, on the 18th of February 2025, Brunel International N.V. (Brunel; BRNL), a global specialist providing tailored project and workforce solutions to foster sustainable industry advancements through technology and talent, has revealed the selection of Toine van Doremalen as the new Chief Financial Officer (CFO), subject to shareholder confirmation. Toine is set to take over the CFO role from Peter de Laat, who transitioned to the position of Chief Executive Officer as of the 1st of October 2024.

news.headline: Fed bids for 1-Yr bills total $2.5 bln.
Esker shareholders are being offered 262 euros per share in a squeeze-out deal by Boréal Bidco SAS.
news.summary: LYON, France & MIDDLETON, Wis.-- In accordance with the Autorité des marchés financiers regulations, a public tender offer has been announced by Boréal Bidco SAS on February 18, 2025. The offer includes an indemnification amounting to 262 euros per Esker SA share. It is important to note that this press release is not an invitation to buy securities or any kind of solicitation.

news.headline: VINCI's share reference price, initial conversion price, and conversion ratio for €400 million bonds due February 2030 determined.
Westwood Financial marks 55 years in retail real estate, owning 125+ top-performing centers, founded in 1970 in Los Angeles.
news.summary: Westwood Financial, a leading retail real estate investment firm, is marking 55 years of managing premier retail centers nationwide. Established in 1970 in Los Angeles by Steven Fogel and Howard Banchik, the company oversees a portfolio of over 125 successful shopping centers anchored by grocery and service stores. These properties are primarily located in thriving Sunbelt markets known for rapid growth.

news.headline: Report predicts India's BNPL market will hit $21.95B by 2025, growing at 13.4% annually, with 22% CAGR from 2021-2024.
news.summary: Dublin - A recent report on the "India Buy Now Pay Later Business and Investment Opportunities Databook" has been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. The Buy Now Pay Later (BNPL) payment market in India is projected to see a 13.4% annual growth, reaching a value of US$21.95 billion by 2025. Between 2021 and 2024, the BNPL market witnessed strong expansion, with a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 22%.

news.headline: Century Communities in Colo. provides online buying, flexible appointments, competitive financing to empower buyers.
news.summary: Revolutionizing the homebuying experience, Century Communities, Inc. based in Greenwood Village, Colorado, as of February 18, 2025, provides customers with online purchasing options, flexible appointment scheduling, competitive financing solutions, and more. As a prominent national homebuilder and pioneer in online home sales, the company, listed on the NYSE under the ticker CCS, continues to lead the industry. Renowned for its innovative approach, Century Communities has been featured on America's Most...

news.headline: ECB allows remote work for around 50% of time.
Jackpot.com partners with Birches Health to enhance responsible play with education, training, and support. San Francisco, Feb. 18, 2025.
news.summary: In San Francisco on February 18, 2025, Jackpot.com announced its enhanced player protection initiatives, which now encompass personalized educational materials, specialized training programs led by clinicians, and improved access to assistance from Birches Health. As a prominent online lottery courier service, Jackpot.com is dedicated to ensuring the safety and well-being of its users. These efforts underline the company's commitment to providing a secure and responsible gaming environment, with a focus on supporting individuals who may be at risk of experiencing issues related to gambling. The expansion of these resources highlights Jackpot.com's proactive approach to promoting responsible gaming practices and the safeguarding of its players.

news.headline: Cornish Metals sets special meeting for shareholders on March 18, 2025.
news.summary: Cornish Metals has confirmed the scheduling of a shareholders' meeting on March 18, 2025.

news.headline: Doyle to auction Iris Apfel's Palm Beach estate with over 600 lots including garments and jewelry.
news.summary: Doyle Auctioneers & Appraisers is introducing a collection of over 600 unique garments, jewelry, and home decor items from the Palm Beach home of a fashion icon. This diverse collection showcases the iconic style of the fashionista and will be auctioned off in New York on February 18, 2025.

news.headline: Yamaha Marine and KDDI showcase Connected Boat® tech at Mobile World Congress 2025 in Barcelona.
news.summary: In Plano, Texas on February 18, 2025, it was announced that Yamaha Motor Corporation, U.S.A.'s Marine Business Unit and KDDI Spherience, the US-based connectivity Center of Excellence of the KDDI group, will showcase their joint efforts at the upcoming Mobile World Congress in Barcelona, Spain. The collaboration between the two companies will be on display in just two weeks at the event.

news.headline: Altium partners with AWS to provide industry-ready skills in electronics design & cloud technology in India.
news.summary: Altium LLC, a prominent player in electronics industry software and solutions, has revealed a partnership with Amazon Web Services (AWS) India Private Limited*. This collaboration aims to revolutionize technology education throughout India by implementing a distinctive curriculum. The newly introduced curriculum is tailored to equip students with the necessary skills for a workforce centered around technology. Additionally, Altium has joined the AWS Skills to Jobs Tech Alliance in India. This alliance, which consists of a consortium of employers and government agencies, focuses on bridging the gap between education and job opportunities in the tech sector.

news.headline: Nuveen Green Capital closes $15 million C-PACE transaction for Madison Station, new multifamily development in Idaho.
news.summary: Nuveen Green Capital (NGC), a renowned provider of sustainable real estate financing, recently finalized a deal for $15 million in C-PACE capital. This funding will be allocated towards Madison Station, a new multifamily development project situated in Rexburg, Idaho. The announcement was made on Feb. 18, 2025, indicating a clear focus on advancing environmentally-friendly commercial real estate ventures.

news.headline: New California bill proposes age requirements for purchasing anti-aging skin care products to be 18+.
news.summary: Proposed legislation aims to mandate individuals to provide documentation proving they are at least 18 years old when purchasing certain products.

news.headline: CookUnity CEO anticipates IPO soon.
2024 results from EVS released.
Top large-cap losers last week: Reddit, GoDaddy, & Trade Desk. West Pharmaceutical Services down 33.22%, Trade Desk down 31.66%, FIS down 17.31%.
news.summary: Eleven large-cap stocks experienced significant declines over the past week. Among them, West Pharmaceutical Services, Inc. (NYSE:WST) saw its stock drop by 33.22%, attributed to underwhelming fourth-quarter results and a disappointing 2025 guidance. The Trade Desk, Inc. (NASDAQ:TTD) also struggled, with a 31.66% decrease following lower-than-expected earnings for the fourth quarter of 2024, prompting analysts to revise their price forecasts. Fidelity National Information Services, Inc. (NYSE:FIS) shares declined by 17.31% after the company released its fourth-quarter results. For more details, refer to the complete article on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Zelensky declines Trump admin's request for 50% of Ukraine's minerals, citing lack of security guarantees.
news.summary: President Volodymyr Zelensky criticized the American proposal publicly, stating his concern over the lack of security guarantees included in it.

news.headline: Pet parrots sparked a $750,000 legal battle in a Manhattan co-op over noise complaints, resulting in a fractured friendship.
news.summary: A legal settlement of $750,000 was reached due to noise complaints within a Manhattan co-op, resulting in the breakdown of a friendship between the parties involved.

news.headline: US & UK skipped global AI safety declaration at AI Action Summit in Paris. Lyft's Q4 revenue: $1.6B, net income: $61.7M. Musk settles Trump lawsuit for $10M. T-Mobile offers free SpaceX's Starlink, Tubi streams Super Bowl for free. Google confirms Google I/O 2025 conference.
news.summary: The United States and the United Kingdom opted out of signing a global AI safety pact at the AI Action Summit in Paris. This is a contrast to past summits where they had endorsed similar agreements. Lyft Inc (NASDAQ:LYFT) revealed its fourth-quarter earnings with revenue hitting $1.6 billion, surpassing analyst predictions of $1.56 billion. The company also reported a net income of $61.7 million, a significant improvement from the $26.3 million loss in the same quarter the previous year.Elon Musk's company X has settled a lawsuit brought against it by Donald Trump for $10 million. T-Mobile U.S. Inc. (NASDAQ:TMUS) has launched free access to its satellite-to-cell beta service, which is powered by SpaceX's Starlink, for all users.Tubi is offering a free live stream of Super Bowl LIX, but users are facing issues casting it to their TVs using Chromecast (Google Cast). Alphabet Inc.’s Google (NASDAQ:GOOG) confirmed that Google I/O 2025, the annual developer conference, will be taking place. For more detailed information, visit Benzinga.com.

news.headline: ReShape Lifesciences® announced a $6.0 million public offering with 2,575,107 units priced at $2.33 each.
news.summary: In Irvine, California on February 15, 2025, ReShape Lifesciences® (Nasdaq: RSLS), a leading physician-led company specializing in weight loss and metabolic health solutions, declared the pricing of 2,575,107 units in a public offering. The units were priced at $2.33 per unit and each consists of either one common share or a pre-funded warrant to acquire a common share, along with one warrant to purchase a common share.

news.headline: Trump's plan for one-for-one tariffs on trading partners may harm global economy with inflation risk.
news.summary: The White House has initiated a procedure to impose retaliatory tariffs on American trade allies, causing uncertainty and potentially leading to inflation. This action could have significant economic implications as it impacts trade relationships and potentially raises prices domestically.

news.headline: Europe approves Merck's cancer drug, Welireg, for VHL disease & advanced clear cell RCC. Approved in 30+ countries for advanced RCC & 40+ countries for VHL disease-associated tumors.
news.summary: The European Commission conditionally approved Merck & Co Inc’s Welireg (belzutifan) for two indications: 1) for adult patients with von Hippel-Lindau disease who require therapy for associated localized renal cell carcinoma, CNS hemangioblastomas, or pancreatic neuroendocrine tumors; and 2) for adult patients with advanced clear cell RCC that progressed after two or more lines of therapy. The approval is based on trials LITESPARK-004 and LITESPARK-005. This is Welireg’s first approval in the EU and it is approved in over 30 countries for advanced RCC and in over 40 countries for VHL disease-associated tumors in certain adult patients.

news.headline: GCL and RF Acquisition Corp. complete merger, GCL starts trading on Nasdaq as “GCL”, and plans bell ringing ceremony.
news.summary: GCL & RF Acquisition Corp. have successfully finalized their business merger, with GCL now beginning trading on the Nasdaq stock exchange under the ticker symbol "GCL". Additionally, the company has shared news of a bell ringing ceremony to celebrate its official listing.

news.headline: Stock of Palantir hit new high on Feb. 14. Bulls optimistic due to AI strategy; bears cautious on lofty valuation.
news.summary: On February 14, the stock of Palantir reached a record high. Supporters highlight the software company's strong AI approach. However, critics emphasize the high valuation of PLTR stock. Projections for Palantir's earnings per share and revenue in 2025 have increased. The question arises whether buying Palantir stock is advisable given its steep valuation.

news.headline: Arete downgrades Lyft, gives lone sell rating as competition with Uber intensifies.
news.summary: In the recent report, it was stated that the latest data shows a 10% increase in the number of COVID-19 cases globally, with the total number reaching 5.2 million. The death toll has also risen by 15%, now surpassing 340,000. The United States remains the worst-hit country with over 1.5 million confirmed cases and more than 90,000 deaths. Europe's total cases have exceeded 2 million, while Asia-Pacific has reported over 600,000 cases. The situation in Latin America is also concerning, with an acceleration in infections seen in Brazil and Mexico. Overall, the pandemic continues to pose a significant threat worldwide.

news.headline: Discover the new dining hotspot in Times Square. Find out why it's gaining popularity and where to dine.
President Trump nominates Gail Slater as top antitrust official. Uncertainty on impact. Is Google stock worth buying/selling?
news.summary: Gail Slater has been put forward by President Donald Trump for the leading antitrust position at the Justice Department. Market experts on Wall Street haven't offered significant feedback on Slater's selection. The latest headlines highlight the appointment of the new top antitrust official by President Trump. Investors are left questioning whether Google stock is a compelling buy or a sell option based on this development.

news.headline: Rollout of shareholder buyback initiative, aiming to purchase 5% of outstanding shares at $15 each.
Standard Motor Products, Inc. launches new corporate website in partnership with Scandia; includes resources for investors.
news.summary: Standard Motor Products, Inc. (NYSE: SMP) has recently revealed the release of its revamped corporate website on February 18, 2025. The redesigned website, developed in collaboration with Scandia, a prominent digital and web company, offers a range of resources tailored to investors. This update signifies a significant step for SMP in enhancing its online presence and providing valuable information to stakeholders.

news.headline: Justice Department under Trump faced unnecessary crisis due to self-inflicted mistake.
Alsana appoints Keesha Amezcua, LMFT, CEDS-C as new Chief Clinical Officer, bringing 20 years of experience to the team.
news.summary: With over two decades of experience in the industry, Keesha Amezcua, MA, LMFT, has joined Alsana's eating recovery community in Westlake Village, California. This internationally renowned leader will bring valuable expertise to the organization. Alsana offers both in-person and virtual treatment programs, and the appointment took place on February 18, 2025.

news.headline: Mexico Economy Minister Ebrard and Deputy Ministers are to meet with the US Commerce Secretary in Washington.

Global rubber track market to grow at 6.2% CAGR, reaching $3.2 billion by 2031, driven by infrastructure boom and compact equipment demand. Key players include Bridgestone, Camso, Continental, McLaren Industries, ITR America, Poson Forging Co., Ltd., and X-Trac Rubber Tracks. Bridgestone invested $60 million in 2022 to expand production capacity. Infra investments and compact equipment adoption are key growth drivers.
news.summary: The global rubber track market, valued at US$1.9 billion in 2022, is projected to grow at a CAGR of 6.2%, reaching US$3.2 billion by 2031. This growth is fueled by infrastructure development, increased compact construction equipment adoption, and rising demand for durable, low-impact mobility solutions in agriculture and mining. Rubber tracks offer superior traction and reduced ground damage compared to traditional steel tracks, with key applications in construction, agriculture, mining, and powersports. Major players include Bridgestone Corporation, Camso Inc., Continental AG, McLaren Industries, ITR America, Poson Forging Co., Ltd., and X-Trac Rubber Tracks. Recent developments include investments in manufacturing plants, acquisitions, and innovative product launches. Infrastructure investments and compact equipment adoption are key growth drivers in the market.
